titleStmt.title: SII 26.80: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 80. (A.R. No. 77 of 1909.) TIRUVĀṈMIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the Tripurasundarī-ammaṉ shrine in the Vēdapurīśvara temple.
This damaged record commences with Tirumaṉṉi vaḷara, the praśasti of the king.
It registers a gift of cows and sheep for lamps to the temple of Mahādēva at Tiruvāṉmiyūr in Kōṭṭūr-nāḍu in Puliyūr-kōṭṭam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟceya
ppāvaiyum cirttaniccelviyun=taṉperun=te viyarā(k)ki Iṉpuṟa neṭutiya
lūḻiyiṉiṭai tuṟaināṭu ntuṭarvaṉavelip paṭarvaṉavāciyum cu
ḷḷi cūḻmatiṭ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟkarumaraṇ maṇṇaik
kaṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻattaraiyar tamuṭiyu māṅkavar teviya
[kaiḻil] muṭiyu muṉnavar pakkaṟ ṟeṉnavar vaitta cuntaramuṭiyu min=tiranāramuThe passage teṉṭicai to muṟaimaiyiṟ is missing.
ṭum kulatanamākiya palarpukaḻmuṭiyuñ ceṅkatirmālaiyum caṅkatirvelai
ttolperuṅkāvaṟ palpaḻan=tivuñ ceruviccinavil Irupattorukālaraicukaḷai kaṭ
ṭa paracurāmaṉ melvaruñ cān=timaṟṟivaraṇ karutiyiruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum
payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkanaḷap perumpuka�
ḻoyam piṭiyiliraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum navanatikkulapperumalaikaḷum vi
kkirama virar cakkarakoṭṭamumutirpaṭavallai maturamaṇṭalamuṅ kāmiṭaivaḷanakar nāma
ṇaikkoṇaiyum veñcilai virar pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭaippaḻana mācuṇitecamumayar
vil vaṇkirttiyāti nakaravaiyiṟ can=tiraṉṟolkulattin=tiranai viḷaiyamarkkaḷattuk kiḷai
ttoṭu niṟaikulatanakkuvaiyum kiṭṭaruñ ceṟimiḷai Oṭṭaviṣayamum pūcurar cernalk ko
mmuṉai yaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colaittaṇṭaputtiyumiraṇacūranai muraṉākat tākkit tik
ṭamum kovin=tacan=taṉ māviḻin=toṭat taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷa tecamun=toṭukaḻaṟa caṅku
veñcamar viḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramu nittila
tiralāṭamum veṟimalarttirttatteṟipunaṟ kaṅkaiyumalaikaṭal naṭuvuṭ palakalañ celutti ca
�ttuṅkapanmarākiya kiṭārattaraiyanai vākaiyamporukaṭaṟ kuṭumpakkariyoṭu makappaṭa
ttavaṉa(na)kanakarp porttoḻil vāytalil viccātirat toraṇamu moyt toḻiṟpuṉai maṇipputa
ṟinirppuṉnaiyumaṉmalai yūraiyiṟ ṟoṉmalaiyūrumāḻkaṭalakaḻcūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamum
ṟai punal māpappāḷāmum kāvalampuricai mevilipaṅkamum viḷaippantuṟuṭai
kālamum kitamarRead titamarvalvinai mātamaliṅkamum kalāmuri kaṭun=tiṟalilāmuritecamum tenakkalar poḻil
pporu taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakesaripanmarāna Uṭaiyār śrī rājendra coḷa devark
ttup puliyūrkkoṭṭattuk koṭṭurnāṭṭu devadāna ntiruvātiyūruṭaiya mahādevar tirunan=ta
kkuc cilālekai ceyvikkaveṉṟu Ikkoṭṭam vakaiceykiṉṟa celūruṭaiyāṉ ka
meṟpaṭi Ūrūrār candrādityavaṟ tirunan=tāviḷakku ErippatākaLine erased here.
ttu ṭṭukkoṇṭāṅkuṭimakkaḷ devarkku ṅkuṭi mutalāṉa pacu muppatukku candra
riṭaiyaṉ tiruvāmiyūr maṉṟāṭiyum ciṅkaṉkoṉum pacu ṉukku muṉṟāka meṟpaṭiyū
yānum yaāṇṭeḻāvatu devarkku kuṭimakkaḷ kuṭuttu yaniṉṟa pacu 10 5kku candrādityavaṟ Erip
nṟāṭi vacam cāvāmuvāpperāṭu nāṟpattañcu pattāvatu Iṉnāṭṭut tuṟaippākkut
viḷakku Erippatāka Ivvūr Iṭaiyaṉ tiruvāmiyūr maṉṟāṭiyum tecamukki maṉṟāṭiyum ciṅ
m Añcukku maiykku Āṭu 10 8 Āka meṟpaṭi Iṭaiyarvacam niṉṟa cāvāmuvāpperāṭu ce
veḷḷāṭṭiva taḻi� ṭṭum cantrātittavar Erippatāka vaitta tirunan=tā viḷakku Araikku Ivar
muvāpperāṭu nāṟpattaiñcu Ivai
kolanta Ippaṭiteṅku kaḻa
Itu Aḻivomākil tiruvāṇai
Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 26.80 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
